action.reasoning: Observation: iter 26 train_fp.py completed but loss=0.0 all epochs, val_AP stuck at 0.0259, identical to previous linear baseline. The model never learned. This suggests fingerprints are all zero (due to molecule building failures) or the masked BCE loss always sums to zero (perhaps all valid labels masked out). We need to diagnose before further training. Decision: write a quick diagnostic script that inspects saved fingerprints and tests molecule building on a small sample. Run it to understand the root cause, then fix in next iteration.
